articles.title: This tiny, magnetic e-reader could stop you from doomscrolling - TechCrunch
articles.description: The Xteink X3 is a delightfully tiny, MagSafe-compatible e-ink reader that attaches to the back of your phone like a Pop Socket.
articles.content: It was love at first sight. It felt like scouring the mall, dipping in and out of sprawling department stores in search of a specific, elusive item, only to finally find what youre looking for. Only,… [+6878 chars]
